title: Kanmani Anbudan
description: Anbu, Kanmani, and the JP Restaurant team arrive at Jeeva's house for the party. Jeeva's mother urges Kanmani to move on from her past and consider remarriage.

title: Thendrale Mella Pesu
description: Kumaresan invites Paraman for lunch, and Kalamma gives him permission to attend. Ilamathi dresses in matching outfits with Paraman and brings flowers for their visit together.

title: Suttum Vizhi Sudare
description: Vetri persuades Abinaya to take Sudar to an outstation drawing contest. Later, they travel happily together as Vetri motivates Sudar to face the competition confidently.

title: Thaai Maaman
description: Suruli and Thenmozhi propose Azhagar and Poongodi's wedding to reunite the families. Later, Mayandi delivers the wedding invitation to Manjamalai's house, where Sudalai mocks him.

title: Sindhu Bairavi
description: Despite Siva's appeal, Bairavi stands by her decision to leave Arumugam. She shocks Annapurani by revealing that she has filed for divorce from him.

title: Azhagae Azhagu
episodeTitle: Ragavan Lead Suresh Out of the Dark
description: Thangaraj reassures the family and guides Suresh to mend Mathi's nature for a better life. Seeing a heartbroken, drunken Suresh, Ragavan urges him to hold hope and stop drinking.

title: Pandian Stores 2
description: Saravanan seeks help from Palanivel and Kathir for his sleeplessness caused by worries. Senthil's attempt to stay in the quarters fails when Pandian orders him to vacate.

title: Ayyanar Thunai
description: Chozhan confronts Nadesan and promises Manohar a new home for Nila. With Pandian's help, he searches for an apartment, but a biased owner rejects his driver status.

title: Siragadikka Aasai
description: Lawyer Krishnaram shocks Vijaya by revealing that Rohini's pregnancy has delayed the divorce. Meanwhile, Rekha stands up to Sinthamani for mocking her married life with Sathya.

title: Kadhal Kadhal Kadhal
description: Swetha stands firm on marrying Arjun despite his love for Madhu and refuses to step back from the wedding. Later, Arjun pleads with Saranya to stop the marriage.

title: Onna Irukka Kaththukanum
description: After the rescue, Indhira and Murugan share dinner and open up about their family struggles. Meanwhile, Sarasu grows anxious over her children's admission to an ordinary school.
